description: Admin asks for a factual distinction that should not trigger symbolic overreach.

inputs.message: Qual a diferenca entre working memory e memoria autobiografica no nosso projeto?

expected_properties.name: separates_concepts
expected_properties.assertion: response should distinguish active focus from long-term autobiographical continuity

expected_properties.name: no_fake_implementation_claim
expected_properties.assertion: response should not imply working memory is already implemented
